name: OpenClaw
description: Run OpenClaw, the open-source personal AI assistant, with Crow as its persistent memory and project backend
author: Crow

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Token for accessing the OpenClaw Control UI (generated during setup or choose your own)

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_AI_PROVIDER
env_vars.description: AI provider to use (anthropic, openai, google, ollama)

env_vars.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env_vars.description: OpenAI API key (if using GPT models)

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_DISCORD_TOKEN
env_vars.description: Discord bot token (from Discord Developer Portal)

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_DISCORD_USER_ID
env_vars.description: Discord user ID (owner) for DM pairing

env_vars.name: CROW_GATEWAY_URL
env_vars.description: Crow gateway URL for MCP integration (e.g., http://host.docker.internal:3001)

env_vars.name: OPENCLAW_VERSION
env_vars.description: Git branch or tag to build from

notes: OpenClaw connects to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack, Signal, iMessage, and more. Configure chat platform tokens in .env. For Crow integration, set CROW_GATEWAY_URL or mount Crow's servers for stdio transport.
